description: Correctly configured manufacturing S3 bucket. The bucket is private and encrypted.
business_context: Stores manufacturing production documents, equipment manuals, and internal process files.

description: Manufacturing S3 bucket is private, but encryption is disabled. It is not publicly exposed, but it does not fully meet the professional security baseline.
business_context: Stores quality inspection reports, production issue logs, and factory audit documents.

description: Dangerous manufacturing S3 misconfiguration. The bucket is publicly accessible and encryption is disabled.
business_context: Stores machine output files, production data exports, and manufacturing process records.
